title: Robots and AI in Our Daily Lives
passage:
Robots in Our Lives

Today, robots and artificial intelligence (AI) are in many places. AI is a special technology. It helps computer machines learn and make decisions. We use robots and AI at home, in schools, and in hospitals every day.

At home, many people have small robot vacuum cleaners. These robots move around the floor. They clean up dust and dirt. They can find their way around chairs and tables. They do not hit things. Some homes also have smart speakers. You can talk to these speakers. You can ask them to play music, tell the weather, or turn on the lights. These speakers use AI to understand your voice and talk back to you.

In some schools, teachers use small robots to help students. These robots can teach languages and math. They can play games with children. Children like learning with robots because they are fun and friendly. However, robots cannot replace human teachers. Teachers are still very important because they understand children's feelings. Robots do not have feelings.

Hospitals also use robots to do different jobs. Some robots help doctors during operations. Other robots carry medicine and food to patients in their beds. This helps nurses have more time. Nurses can talk to patients and help them feel better. Robots do not get tired, so they can work all day and night.

There are also robot cars. These are cars that can drive without a human driver. They use cameras and AI to see the road, other cars, and people. Many companies are testing these cars now. In the future, robot cars will make travel safer and easier for everyone.

In the future, we will see many more robots. They will do difficult and dangerous jobs like putting out fires or cleaning deep oceans. But today, robots are already very helpful friends in our daily lives.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is AI according to the text?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 states: 'AI is a special technology.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What do robot vacuum cleaners do at home?

options.A: They play music and tell the weather.
options.B: They clean up dust and dirt.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'These robots move around the floor. They clean up dust and dirt.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why are human teachers still very important?

options.B: Because they do not get tired.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'Teachers are still very important because they understand children's feelings.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why can hospital robots work all day and night?

options.B: They need to talk to patients.
options.D: They like to put out fires.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Robots do not get tired, so they can work all day and night.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Smart speakers use AI to understand your voice.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'These speakers use AI to understand your voice and talk back to you.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Robots have the same feelings as children.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'Robots do not have feelings.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Hospital robots carry medicine and food to patients.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Other robots carry medicine and food to patients in their beds.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Robot cars are very expensive to buy.
questions.explanation: The text mentions robot cars and that they drive without a human driver, but it does not mention how much they cost.

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Smart speakers can play music and tell the _______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'You can ask them to play music, tell the weather, or turn on the lights.'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Some robots help doctors during operations.'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: In the future, robot cars will make _______ safer and easier.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 states: 'In the future, robot cars will make travel safer and easier for everyone.'

vocabulary.meaning: Công nghệ (các loại máy móc, thiết bị khoa học)
Quyết định (lựa chọn làm việc gì đó)
Thay thế (làm việc của ai đó hoặc cái gì đó)
Bệnh nhân (người ốm đang điều trị tại bệnh viện)

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài đạt điểm cao (A1-A2)

1. Định vị từ khóa (Scanning): Đối với trình độ A1-A2, các từ khóa trong câu hỏi thường giống hệt 100% từ khóa trong bài đọc. Hãy tìm các từ nổi bật như 'smart speakers', 'hospital', 'vacuum cleaners' trong bài trước rồi đọc kỹ câu chứa từ đó.

2. Dạng True/False/Not Given: Nếu bạn hoàn toàn không tìm thấy thông tin về một chi tiết nào đó (ví dụ: giá tiền của ô tô robot ở câu 8), hãy chọn ngay NOT GIVEN. Không tự suy luận.

3. Dạng điền từ vào chỗ trống: Chú ý giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Từ cần điền phải lấy chính xác từ trong bài đọc ra, không được tự ý đổi dạng từ (ví dụ giữ nguyên số nhiều/số ít).
